contact-form-7.title: Unrestricted file upload via filename sanitization bypass
contact-form-7.attack: Attacker uploads .php disguised as .jpg.php through crafted filename, then executes it for RCE.
contact-form-7.fix: Update Contact Form 7 to 5.3.2 or later to fix this issue.

elementor.title: Missing authorization on REST endpoints
elementor.attack: Any logged-in subscriber could upload arbitrary files and take over the site (RCE).
elementor.fix: Update Elementor to 3.6.3 or later to fix this issue.

wpforms-lite.title: Stored XSS via form field labels
wpforms-lite.attack: Authenticated contributor injects JS into form labels, executes in admin context on form review.
wpforms-lite.fix: Update WPForms Lite to 1.8.2.3 or later.

woocommerce.title: SQL injection in WooCommerce admin
woocommerce.attack: Crafted request to admin endpoint exfiltrates DB contents (orders, customers, hashed passwords).
woocommerce.fix: Update WooCommerce to 5.5.1 or later to fix this.

wp-file-manager.title: Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload (elFinder)
wp-file-manager.attack: Unauthenticated attacker uploads PHP shell via elFinder connector. Heavily exploited in the wild.
wp-file-manager.fix: Update WP File Manager to 6.9 or later (or remove if unused).

duplicator.title: Unauthenticated path traversal / arbitrary file read
duplicator.attack: Path traversal in installer downloads wp-config.php anonymously, leaking DB credentials.
duplicator.fix: Update Duplicator to 1.3.28+ and remove leftover installer files.

ninja-forms.title: Code injection via deserialization
ninja-forms.attack: Unauthenticated POP-chain deserialization leads to remote code execution.
ninja-forms.fix: Update Ninja Forms to 3.6.11 or later.

all-in-one-seo-pack.title: Authenticated SQL injection
all-in-one-seo-pack.attack: Privilege escalation: a low-priv user injects SQL via search-terms parameter to dump users table.
all-in-one-seo-pack.fix: Update All in One SEO to 4.1.5.3 or later.

wordpress-core.title: SQL Injection in WP_Query
wordpress-core.attack: Improper sanitization in WP_Query allows attackers to inject SQL via crafted input, potentially exposing sensitive database data.
wordpress-core.fix: Update WordPress core to 5.8.3 or later.

ultimate-member.title: Privilege escalation via account update
ultimate-member.attack: Unauthenticated attacker can modify user roles via crafted request, escalating privileges to admin and taking full control of the site.
ultimate-member.fix: Update Ultimate Member plugin to 2.6.7 or later.

revslider.title: Arbitrary file download/information disclosure
revslider.attack: Unauthenticated attacker exploits ajax endpoint to download sensitive files like wp-config.php, exposing database credentials.
revslider.fix: Update Slider Revolution (RevSlider) to latest version and remove old vulnerable copies bundled in themes.

yoast-seo.title: Reflected XSS in admin dashboard
yoast-seo.attack: Attacker tricks an authenticated admin into clicking a crafted link that injects malicious JavaScript, executing in admin context.
yoast-seo.fix: Update Yoast SEO to 17.3 or later.

litespeed-cache.title: Unauthenticated privilege escalation
litespeed-cache.attack: Improper input validation allows unauthenticated attackers to escalate privileges and gain admin access, leading to full site takeover.
litespeed-cache.fix: Update LiteSpeed Cache to 5.7 or later.

jetpack.title: Reflected XSS via redirect_to parameter
jetpack.attack: Unauthenticated attacker crafts a URL injecting JavaScript into the login redirect flow, executing in the victim's browser.

wp-super-cache.title: Authenticated RCE via cache file
wp-super-cache.attack: Authenticated attacker with admin privileges writes arbitrary PHP to a cache file, achieving remote code execution.
wp-super-cache.fix: Update WP Super Cache to 1.7.2 or later to fix this.

loginizer.title: Unauthenticated SQL injection in login protection
loginizer.attack: Attacker injects SQL via the username field on the login page without authentication, potentially dumping the entire database.
loginizer.fix: Update Loginizer to 1.6.4 or later to secure this.
